lead: Your new **Eye Candy Optical** site is **live** — rebuilt as a fast, static site using **your own product photography**, with both studios, real hours, and a working contact form front and centre.

The honest picture: your old site's *technical SEO was already strong*, so we kept it clean (a perfect **100** on Google's SEO check) while fixing what was actually costing you visits. On Google's PageSpeed test your mobile score climbed into the **90s**, and the page went from a heavy Wix build to pre-built static files that load fast on phones. Accessibility went from **B to A**. It's a one-time build — **you own every account.**
ownershipIntro: Right now both accounts sit under our setup email so we could build it for you. Transfer is by invite — never a shared password.

accounts.name: Hosting — Netlify
accounts.own: → we invite your owner email as Admin, then we step off. You own the live site.

accounts.name: Contact form — Web3Forms
accounts.own: → generate your own key at web3forms.com using info@eyecandyeyewear.com and we paste it in, so enquiries go straight to you.

accounts.name: Domain — eyecandyeyewear.com
accounts.own: → stays yours; we point it at the new site when you approve (see cutover below).

accounts.name: Site code
accounts.own: → no GitHub needed on your side; handed over on request. One-time build, no retainer.

editSteps: This site was built **without a separate CMS login** (your request) — so there’s nothing new to learn and no monthly CMS seat.
All your content (frames, prices, hours, studio details, FAQs) lives in one file in the site’s code.
To change anything — a price, a new frame photo, holiday hours — send the update to us and we publish it; it’s a quick edit + redeploy.
Prefer to self-edit later? We can add a simple CMS (Storyblok) as a one-time add-on so you can edit and publish yourself.
Your real Google reviews can be added on the page anytime — just send a few and we’ll feature them.

finishingSteps.title: 1 · Point your domain (eyecandyeyewear.com) at the new site
finishingSteps.body: Your web address stays exactly the same — we just aim it at the new site. Zero downtime: the old Wix site stays live until you approve this staging link, then we cut over and your email keeps working untouched. Only after it’s confirmed live do you cancel Wix and stop paying that monthly fee. We need two things from you: where the domain is registered, and where your email is hosted (so we preserve it).

finishingSteps.title: 2 · Send leads to your own inbox
finishingSteps.body: The contact form is live now (verified). Generate a free Web3Forms key at web3forms.com using info@eyecandyeyewear.com, send it to us, and we’ll swap it in so every enquiry lands directly in your inbox instead of ours.

finishingSteps.title: 3 · Optional — one-click future updates
finishingSteps.body: If you’d like to update content yourself later, we can wire a simple CMS (Storyblok) so a Publish click rebuilds the site in ~1 minute. One-time add-on; not needed for launch.

goingLive.intro: The site is on a free `*.netlify.app` address so you can review it. When you’re ready to launch on your own domain:
options: Point your domain at the new site in your host’s Domain settings.
goingLive.note: In Netlify: Domain management → Add a domain → follow the DNS steps. HTTPS is automatic.

notes: **Speed by rebuild, not plugin.** Wix runs a heavy JavaScript bundle on every visit; your new site is pre-built static files on a CDN — same content, a fraction of the work for the phone. That's the jump into the 90s on Google's mobile PageSpeed test, which you can re-run yourself at pagespeed.web.dev.

**A look that matches your frames.** A premium editorial design — porcelain canvas, an 'anti-reflective lens' emerald, lens-shaped product framing, a real display/body type system — instead of the generic Wix template. Your $600 frames now look the part.

**The gaps we closed.** Published opening hours for both studios, a working contact form (verified — it emails on submit), proper Optician + LocalBusiness structured data per location, and a real two-location section replacing the blank map box in your old footer.

**Honest on speed & SEO.** We quote Google's PageSpeed score and the move to a static stack — not a 'seconds faster' or 'rank #1' promise (Google's lab numbers aren't real-user data, and a clean technical score isn't a ranking). Your SEO was already good; we kept it that way.
**Still on the list (easy adds).** Your real Google reviews (we don't invent them), your social handles, and an online booking tool if you'd like one.
footer: Eye Candy Optical · Beltline (17th Ave SW) & Oakridge (Oakbay Plaza), Calgary · Built by Studio0rbit · one-time build, no retainer
